author: maxine--basel--refactor-subcommand-structure
content: Plan: Restructure main.rs Commands enum to introduce IssueCommands, TimerCommands, and MigrateCommands sub-enums. Add hidden top-level shortcuts (Create, Quick, List, Show, Close) and aliases (new, issues, subissue, start, stop). Add --parent flag to issue create/quick. Normalize --dry_run to --dry-run. Refactor dispatch match block. Single file change (main.rs) plus minor create.rs update for --parent.
